The Company designs, manufactures and markets smartphones, personal computers,
tablets, wearables and accessories, and sells a variety of related services.

Net sales were $394,328 million for fiscal 2022, an increase of 8% or $28,498
million compared to fiscal 2021. The growth was driven primarily by higher net
sales of iPhone, Services and Mac. iPhone net sales were $205,489 million,
representing 52% of total net sales. Services net sales were $78,129 million,
reflecting continued growth across the App Store, advertising, cloud services,
AppleCare, music and payment services.

Products gross margin was 36.3% in fiscal 2022 compared to 35.3% in fiscal 2021.
Services gross margin was 71.7% in fiscal 2022. The total gross margin percentage
was 43.3% for the full year. Operating income for fiscal 2022 was $119,437
million, up from $108,949 million in the prior year.

Total net sales by reportable segment were as follows: Americas $169,658 million;
Europe $95,118 million; Greater China $74,200 million; Japan $25,977 million; and
Rest of Asia Pacific $29,375 million. The Company's fiscal year is the 52- or
53-week period that ends on the last Saturday of September.
